---
title: "test_api"
output: html_document
---

This notebook is a thin wrapper around the active fetch regression script. The
old inline downloader copy has been removed so the notebook exercises the
current implementation instead of a stale snapshot.

```{r}
source(
  here::here("scripts", "R", "testing", "test_fetch_edm_api_data_2024_onwards.R"),
  local = TRUE
)
```
